faqs.question: What chargers and headphones are compatible with my device?
faqs.answer: All devices are compatible with any standard USB-C charger for charging. You can also use any headphones with a standard 3.5mm audio jack or connect Bluetooth headphones for a wireless listening experience.
faqs.keywords: USB-C charger, USB C, charger, charging, headphones, wired headphones, Bluetooth headphones, Bluetooth, 3.5mm audio jack, compatible accessories

faqs.question: How do I add an app to the Home Screen?
faqs.answer:
Step 1: Swipe up from the bottom of the Home Screen to open the app drawer.

Step 2: Find the app you want to add.

Step 3: Tap and hold the app icon.

Step 4: Drag the app to your desired location on the Home Screen, then release it.
faqs.keywords: add app to Home Screen, app icon, app drawer, swipe up, move app, home screen, app shortcut, icon missing

faqs.question: What is Admin Mode, and why are some features blocked?
faqs.answer:
There is no need to worry about Admin Mode. Our devices are specifically designed to provide a distraction-free experience for camps and other supervised environments.

The Campfire and FyrFly Players are intended for listening to music, audiobooks, podcasts, FM radio, and reading books. To help keep users focused and prevent access to non-essential features, other apps and device settings are restricted through Admin Mode.

This is expected behavior and is part of the device's built-in management system.
faqs.keywords: admin mode, device management, restricted mode, blocked apps, settings locked, camp mode, restrictions, managed device

faqs.question: What are the dimensions of the Campfire Player 2, Campfire Player 2+, and FyrFly Player?
faqs.answer: The Campfire Player 2, Campfire Player 2+, and FyrFly Player all have the same dimensions, measuring approximately 4.5 inches x 2.1 inches (11.4 cm x 5.3 cm).
faqs.keywords: Campfire Player 2 dimensions, Campfire Player 2+ size, FyrFly dimensions, player size, measurements, device dimensions

faqs.question: Can I remove or delete Admin Mode?
faqs.answer:
No. Admin Mode is a built-in factory feature and cannot be removed from the device.

It is an essential part of the Campfire and FyrFly Players and helps ensure the device functions as intended. Certain settings and features are intentionally restricted to prevent unauthorized changes, app installations, or access to unsupported content. This helps provide a safe, distraction-free experience for camps and other supervised environments.
faqs.keywords: remove admin mode, delete admin mode, admin account, factory settings, device restrictions, managed device, settings locked

faqs.question: Can I set a password on my device?
faqs.answer:
No. We no longer support password protection on our devices.

This feature was removed because many users, especially children, would forget their passwords. Recovering access required a full factory reset, which erased all data and content stored on the device.

Removing password protection helps provide a simpler and more reliable experience for all users.
faqs.keywords: password, lock screen, screen lock, device password, PIN, passcode, security, factory reset

faqs.question: Can I use my device without Wi-Fi?
faqs.answer:
Yes! Once your content has been downloaded, your device can be used without a Wi-Fi connection.

There are two ways to add content to your device:

1. Use a streaming service
You can download music, audiobooks, and other content from supported streaming services, including Spotify, Apple Music, Amazon Music, and Audible.

After downloading your content, you can listen offline for up to 30 days. After that, simply reconnect the device to Wi-Fi so the streaming app can refresh your subscription, and you'll receive another 30 days of offline access.

2. Transfer your own music files
If you already have compatible audio files (such as MP3s) on your computer, you can transfer them to your device using the FyrFly Music app and a Box account.

To transfer your music:

Create a Box account.
Install the FyrFly Music app from the App Store on your device.
Upload your supported audio files to your Box account.
Open the FyrFly Music app.
Tap the menu icon and select Box Account.
Sign in to your Box account.
Select and download the songs you want on your device.

Once your files have been downloaded, they can be played anytime without a Wi-Fi connection.
faqs.keywords: Wi-Fi, offline mode, offline music, no internet, Spotify offline, Apple Music offline, Amazon Music offline, Audible offline, MP3 transfer, Box, FyrFly Music

faqs.question: Why do I need to connect my device to Wi-Fi every 30 days?
faqs.answer:
If you use a streaming service such as Spotify, Apple Music, Amazon Music, or Audible, you'll need to connect your device to Wi-Fi at least once every 30 days.

This is a requirement of the streaming providers to verify that your subscription is still active and to ensure artists and content creators are properly compensated. Once the device reconnects to Wi-Fi and your subscription is verified, you'll receive another 30 days of offline listening.
faqs.keywords: 30 days, Wi-Fi every 30 days, offline listening, streaming subscription, Spotify offline, Apple Music offline, Amazon Music offline, Audible offline, license verification

faqs.question: How do I reset and update a pre-2023 device?
faqs.answer:
If you have a Campfire Player manufactured before 2023, you can reset and update your device by following the instructions in the video below:

https://youtu.be/enQavlEzssk

The video provides step-by-step guidance to help you complete the reset and update process.
faqs.keywords: pre-2023 device, reset device, update device, Campfire Player reset, firmware update, factory reset, old Campfire Player

faqs.question: How do I factory reset my Campfire Player 2, Campfire Player 2+, or FyrFly Player?
faqs.answer:
To factory reset your device, follow these steps:

Turn the device off completely.
Press and hold the Power button. Count to 2, then on the count of 3, press and hold the Volume Down (-) button while continuing to hold the Power button.
When the Android recovery screen (showing a robot lying down) appears, release both buttons.
Quickly press the Power button and the Volume Up (+) button at the same time to enter Recovery Mode.
Use the Volume Down (-) button to highlight Wipe data/factory reset, then press the Power button to select it.
Highlight Factory data reset using the Volume Down (-) button, then press the Power button to confirm.
Once the reset is complete, highlight Reboot system now and press the Power button.
Wait for the device to restart. The first boot may take a few minutes.

Note: A factory reset will erase all downloaded content and settings from the device.
faqs.keywords: factory reset, reset device, recovery mode, Campfire Player 2 reset, Campfire Player 2+, FyrFly reset, wipe data, reboot

faqs.question: How do I factory reset my Campfire Player 1?
faqs.answer:
To factory reset your Campfire Player 1, follow these steps:

Make sure the device is fully charged and unplugged from the charger.
From the Home Screen, press and hold the Power button, then select Shut Down.
Once the screen turns black, wait 30 seconds.
Press and hold the Volume Up (+) button and the Power button at the same time until the recovery menu appears.
Use the Volume Down (-) button to highlight Factory Reset.
Press the Volume Up (+) button to confirm the reset.
Wait for the device to restart. The first boot may take a few minutes.

Note: A factory reset will erase all downloaded content and settings from the device.
faqs.keywords: Campfire Player 1 reset, factory reset, recovery mode, reset device, wipe data, reboot, Campfire Player troubleshooting

faqs.question: How do I reset my Spark earbuds?
faqs.answer:
If you're having trouble connecting your Spark earbuds, try the following reset procedure:

On your phone, delete "Spark" from the list of paired Bluetooth devices and turn Bluetooth off.
Remove both earbuds from the charging case. The LEDs on both earbuds will flash blue, and you'll hear the "Pairing" prompt.
Quickly tap the touch area on both earbuds five times. The LEDs will turn purple and then turn off, and you'll hear the "Power off" prompt.
Press and hold the touch area on both earbuds for 3 seconds to power them back on. You'll hear the "Power on" prompt, and the LEDs will flash red and blue alternately.
Turn Bluetooth back on and pair your Spark earbuds with your device again.
faqs.keywords: Spark earbuds reset, reset earbuds, Bluetooth pairing, reconnect earbuds, Spark Bluetooth, earbuds not connecting

faqs.question: How do I change the font size on my device?
faqs.answer:
To adjust the font size on your device, follow these steps:

Step 1: From the Home Screen, swipe up from the bottom to open the app drawer.

Step 2: Open the Settings app.

Step 3: Tap Display.

Step 4: Tap Advanced.

Step 5: Scroll down and tap Font size.

Step 6: Adjust the slider to make the text smaller or larger based on your preference.
faqs.keywords: font size, text size, display settings, larger text, smaller text, accessibility, display

faqs.question: Why doesn't "Sign in with Google" work on my device?
faqs.answer:
The "Sign in with Google" option is not supported on Campfire and FyrFly Players.

Our devices do not support Google services, web browsing, or browser-based authentication required for Google Sign-In (OAuth). As a result, any app that requires "Continue with Google" or "Sign in with Google" will not be able to complete the login process.

To sign in, simply choose the option to log in with your email address and password instead.
faqs.keywords: Google login, Sign in with Google, Google OAuth, Google authentication, login issue, OAuth not working, email login

faqs.question: How do Campfire and FyrFly Players work?
faqs.answer:
Campfire and FyrFly Players are designed to provide a safe, distraction-free listening experience.

Each device includes an App Store where you can download popular music and audio apps, including Spotify, Apple Music, Amazon Music, Audible, Pandora, Spotify Kids, Calm, and FM Radio.

Most streaming apps allow you to download music, playlists, audiobooks, and podcasts directly to the device so you can enjoy them offline without a Wi-Fi connection.

If you don't have a subscription to a streaming service, some apps may still be available to use with free accounts, although they may include ads and have limited features.

You can also use the FyrFly Music Player app to transfer your own compatible audio files. Simply upload your music to a Box account, sign in through the FyrFly Music Player app, and download your files directly to the device for offline listening.
faqs.keywords: how it works, Campfire Player, FyrFly Player, music apps, streaming apps, App Store, Spotify, Apple Music, Amazon Music, Audible, Pandora, Spotify Kids, FM Radio, Box, FyrFly Music Player, offline music

faqs.question: How do I access the app drawer?
faqs.answer:
To access the app drawer, simply swipe up from the bottom of the Home Screen.

The app drawer contains all the apps installed on your device, including:

App Store
Spotify / Spotify Kids
Apple Music
Amazon Music
Settings
And any other installed apps

From the app drawer, you can open the App Store to install, update, or uninstall apps, or launch any app installed on your device.
faqs.keywords: app drawer, app menu, swipe up, Home Screen, open apps, App Store, installed apps, find apps

faqs.question: How do I change the device language to English?
faqs.answer:
To change your device language to English, follow these steps:

Step 1: Open the Settings app.

Step 2: Scroll down until you find the option with an exclamation mark inside a circle, then tap it.

Step 3: Tap the first option, which has a globe (earth) icon. This will open the language settings.

Step 4: Tap the plus (+) icon to add a new language.

Step 5: Select English from the list. If you don't see it, tap the Search icon in the upper-right corner and type English.

Step 6: Once English has been added, select it as your preferred language if prompted.
faqs.keywords: change language, English, language settings, device language, translate device, settings language, change to English

faqs.question: How do I connect my device to Wi-Fi?
faqs.answer:
To connect your device to a Wi-Fi network, follow these steps:

Step 1: From the Home Screen, swipe up from the bottom to open the app drawer.

Step 2: Open the Settings app.

Step 3: Tap Network & Internet.

Step 4: Make sure the Wi-Fi switch is turned On.

Step 5: Tap Wi-Fi to view available networks.

Step 6: Select your Wi-Fi network and enter the password when prompted.

Step 7: Tap Connect. Once connected, your device is ready to download apps, stream content, and receive updates.
faqs.keywords: connect to Wi-Fi, Wi-Fi setup, wireless network, internet connection, network settings, Wi-Fi password

faqs.question: How do I download apps from the App Store?
faqs.answer:
To download apps to your Campfire or FyrFly Player, follow these steps:

Step 1: Connect your device to a stable Wi-Fi network.

Step 2: Make sure the device's date and time are set correctly.

Step 3: From the Home Screen, swipe up from the bottom to open the app drawer.

Step 4: Open the App Store.

Step 5: Browse or search for the app you want to install.

Step 6: Tap the app and select Install.

Step 7: Wait for the installation to complete, then open the app from the App Store or the app drawer.
faqs.keywords: download apps, App Store, install apps, app installation, Spotify, Apple Music, Amazon Music, app drawer

faqs.question: How do I uninstall an app from my Campfire or FyrFly Player?
faqs.answer:
To uninstall an app, follow these steps:

Step 1: From the Home Screen, swipe up from the bottom to open the app drawer.

Step 2: Open the App Store.

Step 3: Find and tap the app you want to uninstall.

Step 4: Tap Uninstall.

Step 5: Wait for the app to be removed from your device.

Note: Apps must be uninstalled through the App Store, not through the Android Settings menu.
faqs.keywords: uninstall app, remove app, delete app, App Store, uninstall Spotify, uninstall Apple Music, uninstall Amazon Music, uninstall Calm

faqs.question: How do I increase the screen brightness?
faqs.answer:
There are two ways to adjust the screen brightness on your device.

Option 1: Quick Settings

Step 1: From the Home Screen, swipe down from the top of the screen.

Step 2: Swipe down again to fully expand the Quick Settings menu.

Step 3: Adjust the Brightness slider to your desired level.

Option 2: Settings

Step 1: Open the Settings app.

Step 2: Tap Display.

Step 3: Tap Brightness level.

Step 4: Adjust the slider to increase or decrease the screen brightness.
faqs.keywords: brightness, screen brightness, display brightness, brightness level, dim screen, increase brightness, display settings

faqs.question: How do I download music for offline listening in Spotify?
faqs.answer:
To download music from Spotify for offline listening, follow these steps:

Step 1: Connect your device to a stable Wi-Fi network.

Step 2: Open the Spotify app and sign in to your account.

Step 3: Open the playlist, album, or podcast you want to download.

Step 4: Turn on the Download toggle at the top of the screen.

Step 5: Wait for the download to finish. Once complete, your content will be available for offline listening.

Step 6: To verify that your music has been downloaded, turn off Wi-Fi and open Spotify. Your downloaded content should still be available.

For more information about downloading content in Spotify, visit Spotify's official help page:
https://newsroom.spotify.com/2019-05-24/how-to-download-and-listen-to-music-and-podcasts-offline-and-on-the-go/
faqs.keywords: Spotify download, offline Spotify, download playlists, download albums, offline music, Spotify offline mode, local music

faqs.question: What are my options for adding music to my Campfire or FyrFly Player?
faqs.answer:
There are two ways to add music and other audio content to your Campfire or FyrFly Player.

Option 1: Use a streaming service

You can subscribe to a supported streaming service such as Spotify, Apple Music, Amazon Music, Audible, or Spotify Kids. These apps allow you to stream and download music, playlists, audiobooks, and podcasts directly to your device for offline listening.

To keep downloaded content available, you'll need to reconnect the device to Wi-Fi at least once every 30 days. This is required by streaming providers to verify that your subscription is active and to ensure artists and content creators are properly compensated.

Option 2: Transfer your own music files

If you already have compatible audio files (such as MP3s) on your computer, you can transfer them to your device using the FyrFly Music Player app and a Box account.

To transfer your music:

Step 1: Create a Box account.

Step 2: Open the App Store on your device and install FyrFly Music Player.

Step 3: Upload your supported audio files to your Box account.

Step 4: Open the FyrFly Music Player app.

Step 5: Tap the menu icon in the upper-left corner.

Step 6: Select Box Account and sign in.

Step 7: Select the songs you want to download to your device.

Once downloaded, your music can be played anytime without a Wi-Fi connection.
faqs.keywords: add music, transfer music, MP3, Box, FyrFly Music Player, Spotify, Apple Music, Amazon Music, Audible, Spotify Kids, offline music, streaming services

faqs.question: How do I download music for offline listening?
faqs.answer:
To download music for offline listening, simply sign in to your preferred music streaming app and follow that service's instructions for downloading content.

The Campfire and FyrFly Players support the following streaming services:

Spotify: https://newsroom.spotify.com/2019-05-24/how-to-download-and-listen-to-music-and-podcasts-offline-and-on-the-go/
Amazon Music: https://www.amazon.com/gp/help/customer/display.html?nodeId=GMNHEFFY6TU8PV4U
Apple Music: https://support.apple.com/en-us/HT204839

Note: Downloaded content from streaming services requires you to reconnect your device to Wi-Fi at least once every 30 days so the service can verify your subscription.
faqs.keywords: offline music, download music, Spotify offline, Apple Music offline, Amazon Music offline, streaming services, offline listening

faqs.question: Does my device come with a pre-installed screen protector?
faqs.answer:
Yes. All Campfire and FyrFly Players come with a plastic screen protector pre-installed from the factory.

Before using the device, you can remove the protective plastic film. If you purchased a tempered glass screen protector, remove the plastic film first, then install the tempered glass protector by following these steps:

Step 1: Carefully peel off the pre-installed plastic screen protector.

Step 2: Clean the screen with a microfiber cloth to remove any dust or fingerprints.

Step 3: Align the tempered glass protector with the screen.

Step 4: Gently press the center of the protector and allow it to adhere, smoothing outward to remove any air bubbles.

Step 5: Wipe the screen with a microfiber cloth to remove any remaining fingerprints or smudges.
faqs.keywords: screen protector, plastic film, pre-installed screen protector, tempered glass, remove screen protector, protective film

faqs.question: How do I set the date, time, and time zone on my device?
faqs.answer:
To manually set the date, time, and time zone, follow these steps:

Step 1: From the Home Screen, swipe up from the bottom to open the app drawer.

Step 2: Open the Settings app.

Step 3: Scroll down and tap System.

Step 4: Tap Date & Time.

Step 5: Turn Automatic date & time Off.

Step 6: Tap Set date, choose the correct date, and tap OK.

Step 7: Tap Select time zone, then choose the correct time zone.

Step 8: Tap Set time, select the correct time, and tap OK.

Step 9: Press the Back button to return to the previous screen.

Step 10: Press the Home button (the circle at the bottom of the screen) to return to the Home Screen.

Your device should now display the correct date, time, and time zone.
faqs.keywords: date and time, set date, set time, time zone, clock, incorrect time, system settings, date settings

faqs.question: How do I use my Shoutout Pro headphones?
faqs.answer:
To use your Shoutout Pro headphones, follow these steps:

Step 1: Press and hold the NC/BT button on the right earcup until you hear the "Power on" voice prompt.

Step 2: To enable or disable Noise Cancelling, press the NC/BT button once.

Step 3: To turn the headphones off, press and hold the NC/BT button again until you hear the "Power off" voice prompt.
faqs.keywords: Shoutout Pro, headphones, power on, power off, noise cancelling, NC button, Bluetooth headphones

faqs.question: My Sparkle speaker won't turn on or isn't working. What should I do?
faqs.answer:
If your Sparkle speaker isn't turning on or isn't working properly, follow these steps:

Step 1: Charge the speaker overnight to ensure the battery is fully charged.

Step 2: After charging, follow the troubleshooting steps shown in this video:
https://youtu.be/UPHoLqOCm9c

Step 3: If the speaker still isn't working after completing the steps above, please contact our support team for further assistance.
faqs.keywords: Sparkle speaker, speaker not turning on, speaker not working, Sparkle troubleshooting, charge speaker, reset speaker

faqs.question: What are the dimensions of the Sparkle Speaker?
faqs.answer: The Sparkle Speaker measures approximately 15 inches (L) × 6 inches (W) × 9 inches (H).
faqs.keywords: Sparkle Speaker dimensions, Sparkle size, speaker measurements, Sparkle specifications, speaker size

faqs.question: What's the difference between Spark Plugs and Swing Buds?
faqs.answer:
Both the Spark Plugs and Swing Buds offer excellent wireless audio, but each is designed with different features and benefits.

Spark Plugs

Up to 4 hours of battery life with Environmental Noise Cancellation (ENC) enabled.
Up to 5 hours of battery life with ENC turned off.
Charging case provides 3 additional full charges, for up to 20 hours of total listening time.
Features Lossless HD Sound with dual microphones for crystal-clear calls and audio.
Powered by Qualcomm Bluetooth 5.2 for fast and reliable connectivity.
Includes an LED battery indicator on the charging case.

Swing Buds

Up to 6 hours of continuous listening on a single charge.
Features Active Noise Reduction with three selectable listening modes.
Includes Transparency Mode, allowing you to hear your surroundings without removing the earbuds.
Built with premium metal materials for added durability and a distinctive design.
Designed to pair perfectly with the Campfire Player for an immersive listening experience.

Overall, Spark Plugs are ideal if you want exceptional sound quality, crystal-clear calls, and a compact charging case with extended battery life. Swing Buds are a great choice if you prefer longer listening time on a single charge, customizable noise control, and a premium design.
faqs.keywords: Spark Plugs vs Swing Buds, compare earbuds, Spark Plugs, Swing Buds, battery life, noise cancellation, transparency mode, Bluetooth earbuds
